tool_args.label: Financial and Ridership Reports – July 2024
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit Financial and Ridership Reports – July 2024 presented by Jaibala Patel, Deputy Chief Financial Officer, MTA. Covers NYCT and Staten Island Railway financial performance, ridership, and staffing for July 2024 (FY24 Mid-Year).

payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – July 2024
payload.description: NYCT and Staten Island Railway financial and ridership report for July 2024 covering FY24 Mid-Year actuals vs forecast.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
